expectations.text: Output contains a session summary with a 'What Got Done' section listing specific items
expectations.evidence: Has 'What Was Built / Changed' section with specific items listed under multiple subsections

expectations.text: Output includes the final closeout block with all 4 fields: summary, decisions logged, priorities updated, memory saved
expectations.evidence: No standardized closeout block. Output ends with 'Open Threads / Watch Items' but has no crisp 'Session closed.' summary block with the 4 required fields

expectations.text: Output references running git status or git diff to ground the summary
expectations.evidence: Agent ran git status and git diff --stat to ground the summary

expectations.text: Output checks context/current-priorities.md and makes a judgment on whether it needs updating
expectations.evidence: 'Priorities Check' section confirms file is accurate and lists current priorities — no update needed
